# Faruk Sevük

> 21-year-old Computer Engineering student in Istanbul who ships production AI apps. Built Meld — an AI fusion-cooking iOS app — alone, from first sketch to paying App Store subscribers. Open to a 3–6 month Erasmus+ traineeship with an EU team (the Erasmus+ grant covers his costs, so there is near-zero cost to the host company).

## Facts

- Meld: AI fusion-cooking app, live on the App Store — pick two cuisines and it invents a dish that respects both. 106 cuisines, 11 dietary/religious systems (Halal to Jain to Orthodox fasting), fully localized in 12 languages, RevenueCat subscriptions. Built solo: Flutter, Supabase, Gemini API with custom prompt engineering. Product site: https://meldkitchen.vercel.app/
- SMMM Asistanım: Windows desktop automation for a financial consultancy with 100+ clients — fills government portals itself (Selenium + Firebase); cut manual data entry by ~70%; in daily production use.
- Dreamie: dream-journal app giving three AI readings per dream (psychological, spiritual, Islamic), each with its own Gemini prompt pipeline; Cloud Firestore history.
- 1st of 15 teams — IKUANTS Glow Up Ideathon (sustainable student-housing platform).
- Stack: Flutter/Dart, Gemini API, Supabase, Firebase, Python, Selenium, n8n, RevenueCat, C/C++/C#, SQL, ASP.NET MVC.
- Languages: Turkish (native), English (C1), German (A2, learned during a 2025 Erasmus exchange in Karlsruhe, Germany).
- Education: B.Eng. Computer Engineering, Istanbul Kültür University (2022–2026).
